metadata.description: Runbook + PoC templates for authorized security engagements on open-source web apps

plugins.name: authorized-pentest
plugins.description: Runbook for authorized security engagements on open-source web apps — from first probe through coordinated disclosure and patch delivery. Covers scope hygiene, verification discipline, `gh api` advisory workflow, patch delivery when the temporary private fork is inaccessible, typecheck-and-test gates, and standard technique recipes (SSRF error-shape oracle, rate-limit posture measurement, sanitiser-bypass harness with JSDOM strict check, version fingerprint via content-echoing SSRF).
